question_text: Which of the following represents the BEST example of an energy-efficient device?

options.label: A
options.text: An old incandescent light bulb that produces light but generates a lot of heat

options.label: B
options.text: An LED light bulb that produces bright light using very little electrical energy

options.label: C
options.text: A kettle that takes 10 minutes to boil water

options.label: D
options.text: A refrigerator that leaves the door open

explanation: LED bulbs are much more energy-efficient than incandescent bulbs because they convert a higher proportion of electrical energy into useful light and waste less energy as heat. Option B represents the best efficiency.
